title: Salty Hail Stir-fry
description: A hearty and comforting savory dish featuring hail (a common ingredient in Uruguayan cuisine) with a tadka base for added flavor and coziness, suitable for Jain followers.
instructions: Chop the onion and garlic finely.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add chopped onions and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pan and sauté for about 1 minute.
Stir in tomato puree, salt (to your preference), and continue to stir-fry for an additional minute or two.
Pour in the hail and mix thoroughly. Cook for another 2-3 minutes until the mixture is heated through.
Serve hot with a side of rice or naan bread.
